name: August Storm
descriptionTemplate: When commanding an infantry elite force, friendly units (including the commanding unit itself) within a 1-hex radius deal +10% damage to land units (If the elite force's level is at least 9, the bonus becomes 15%). For each additional friendly elite force within range, an additional X% damage bonus is applied, up to 25%.

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding an infantry elite force, friendly units (including the commanding unit itself) within a 1-hex radius deal +10% damage to land units (If the elite force's level is at least 9, the bonus becomes 15%). For each additional friendly elite force within range, an additional 1% damage bonus is applied, up to 25%.
progression.renderedDescFr: When commanding an infanterie unités d'élite, unités alliées (including the commanding unité itself) within a 1-hex radius inflige +10% de dégâts to land unités (If the unités d'élite's niveau is at least 9, the bonus becomes 15%). For each additional allié unités d'élite within portée, an additional 1% dégâts bonus is applied, up to 25%.
